title: ws.rs: GROUP_CREATE, GROUP_LIST, GROUP_LEAVE handlers
description:
What: Add three relay WebSocket handlers in relay/src/ws.rs.

GROUP_CREATE:
1. Parse GroupCreateParams
2. Check subscription gate (if require_subscription)
3. group_id = Uuid::new_v4().to_string()
4. store.create_group(group_id, pub_id.0, name).await
5. store.add_group_member(group_id, pub_id.0).await  -- creator is first member
6. Return GroupCreateResult { group_id, name }

GROUP_LIST:
1. store.list_groups_for_user(pub_id.0).await
2. For each group: store.member_count(group_id).await
3. Return GroupListResult { groups: Vec<GroupInfo> }

GROUP_LEAVE:
1. Parse GroupLeaveParams { group_id }
2. store.is_group_member(group_id, pub_id.0).await → if false return NOT_A_MEMBER error
3. store.remove_group_member(group_id, pub_id.0).await
4. If store.member_count(group_id).await == 0: store.delete_group(group_id).await
5. Return OkResult { ok: true }

Defensive rules:
- Subscription gate check before any store operation
- Verify group exists (get_group returns Some) before GROUP_LEAVE
- NOT_A_MEMBER error code (-32012) when caller not in group
- GROUP_NOT_FOUND error code (-32011) when group does not exist

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay passes; e2e test: create → list shows 1 group; leave → list shows 0 groups; leave non-member returns NOT_A_MEMBER error
